market_regime.interpretation: Put walls are temporary support (breakdown likely). Call walls are strong resistance. Gamma flip acts as dynamic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to heavily negative total GEX, amplifying directional moves.
outlook.summary: The market is in a short gamma regime with an extremely negative total GEX (-1.08B). Heavy put hedging and high Put/Call Ratios across Weekly and Monthly expirations indicate strong bearish sentiment. Max Pain is substantially below the spot price, creating a strong downward magnetic pull. Expect amplified volatility and sustained pressure on support levels.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Max Pain combined with heavy Call OI (13k). Acts as an immediate magnetic target and resistance ceiling.
Significant Call OI in both 0DTE (11k) and MONTHLY (23k). Marks a strict upper boundary for the current structure.
Major Put support in 0DTE (31k OI) and MONTHLY (36k OI). Primary defense line against negative gamma acceleration.
Massive Put OI confluence between WEEKLY (77k) and MONTHLY (52k). A break below triggers extreme dealer hedging.
Extreme downside support with dominant Put OI in WEEKLY (90k) and MONTHLY (43k). Ultimate structural floor.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected near resistance due to negative 0DTE GEX; positive weekly/monthly GEX stabilizes broader structure.
outlook.summary: Price is compressed between the Monthly Gamma Flip (~669.5) and a massive Triple-Expiry Call Wall at 675. Negative 0DTE GEX and a bearish smirk skew indicate aggressive intraday hedging, but positive structural GEX limits severe downside. Expect volatile price action pinned around the 670 Max Pain level.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI across all expirations (0DTE: 4800, WEEKLY: 29866, MONTHLY: 24510) creates a major structural ceiling reinforced by high volume.
Significant Call OI cluster across all three expirations (0DTE: 5632, WEEKLY: 7298, MONTHLY: 24456) providing a secondary hard ceiling.
0DTE Max Pain (670.0) aligns perfectly with the Monthly Gamma Flip (669.49) and the highest 0DTE Put OI (9560), acting as a strong structural anchor.
Extreme Put OI in WEEKLY (79818) and MONTHLY (37228) establishes a definitive structural floor for the current and near-term cycles.
Highest single-expiry Put OI in the 0DTE dataset (9955 OI) combined with heavy volume defines the immediate intraday downside defense.
Dominant monthly Put OI (52298) paired with strong weekly OI (12453) acts as the ultimate tail-risk barrier.
